title: Layoff Journey
subtitle: An article about my first layoff experience happening in Aug 25th, 2025
summary: I was laid off in August 2025.To be honest, it didn’t come completely out of nowhere. The industry had already been going through waves of layoffs, and deep down I knew it was possible. Still, when it actually happened, it felt abrupt and strangely disorienting.

blocks.text: The company had apparently planned it earlier, but due to internal processes—legal reviews, coordination—it got delayed. Then one Monday, it finally happened. A Monday layoff. That alone felt off, almost symbolic of how chaotic things had become.

blocks.label: 硅谷裁员潮，终究逃不掉——2025年中失业故事

detail.text: The company had apparently planned it earlier, but due to internal processes—legal reviews, coordination—it got delayed. Then one Monday, it finally happened. A Monday layoff. That alone felt off, almost symbolic of how chaotic things had become.
